classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域显示电机端面、动力线和NTC线束的走向及连接器安装位置，并以引线标注'动力线:L=100-120mm'、'NTC线长L≥300mm'、端子型号'E2508'和胶壳型号'5013300231（白)'；虽出现U、V、W、G线标识，但未给出针脚编号、线色或接线对应表，主要表达线缆与连接器的物理结构位置。

engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Envelope diameters include Φ112 max on both sides, Φ87 min, and overall Φ115±0.043.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Connector/lead clearance includes 14.5 max including solder joints.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Several visible symbols such as some datum and perpendicularity frame components were not independently OCR-detected; they were retained only where tied to an OCR source box.

unresolved_items.issue: Standalone 'max' fragments overlap vertical diameter callouts already represented by corrected Φ112 (max); not used separately.

Duplicate tolerance fragment '+0.03' within the same Φ60 callout area already represented by ocr_016; not used to avoid duplicate source assignment.
Overlapping duplicate value fragment for the right upper perpendicularity callout already represented by ocr_007.
Overlapping duplicate fragments already covered by merged annotations.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框内是电机性能参数表，包含'额定转矩Rated Torque'、'最大转矩Maximum torque'、'额定转速Rated Speed'、'最大转速Maximum speed'以及单位'N·m'、'rpm'等电机扭矩和转速性能数据；在给定类别中与电机性能曲线/图表类最接近。

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标框为'线束定义表 Wire Signal Definition'，表格给出U、V、W相线及NTC1、NTC2信号与引线颜色、线径14AWG和26AWG的对应关系，属于动力线束接线/信号定义信息；全图中该表位于电机外形图右下方并与线束说明区域对应。

regions.content:
1. 带★要求，为产品重要和关键特性
    Requirements marked with ★ indicate important and critical features of the product
  2. 引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损伤
    The outgoing line cannot be disconnected, and the insulation layer and wire core cannot be damaged
  3. 定子引出线参照GB/T 7345-2008要求
    The stator outgoing line shall comply with the requirements of GB/T 7345-2008
  4. 对于定子三相线，每根引出线应能承受9.0N的拉力
    For stator three-phase wires, each lead out wire should be able to withstand a tensile force of 9.0N
regions.content_en:
1. Lead wires must not be disconnected; insulation and conductor must not be damaged
    The outgoing line cannot be disconnected, and the insulation layer and wire core cannot be damaged

  2. For stator three-phase wires, each lead wire shall withstand a pull of 9.0 N
    For stator three-phase wires, each lead out wire should be able to withstand a tensile force of 9.0N

技术要求Technicalrequirements:
1、带★要求，为产品重要和关键特性
Requirements marked with ★ indicate important and critical features of the product
2、引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损伤
The outgoing line cannot be disconnected, and the insulation layer and wire core cannot be damaged
3、定子引出线参照GB/T7345-2008要求
The stator outgoing line shall comply with the requirements of GB/T 7345-2008
4、对于定子三相线，每根引出线应能承受9.0N的拉力
For stator three-phase wires, each lead out wire should be able to withstand a tensile force of 9.ON

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框为图纸中的'技术要求Technical requirements'文本块，内容规定引出线不得断开、绝缘层和线芯不得损伤、定子引出线按GB/T 7345-2008、三相引出线承受9.0N拉力，属于机械图纸对线缆结构与装配质量的技术说明；未出现针脚编号、功能对应或接线表，因此最接近机械尺寸类。

电机转矩-转速关系曲线
Torque—speed specifications

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框内为坐标曲线图，标题含'电机转矩-转速关系曲线'和'Torque—speed specifications'，纵轴为'转矩 (N·m)'，横轴为'转速 (rpm)'，并标出短时工作区、连续工作区以及点'(3200,11.5)'、'(3100,3.5)'等转矩转速关系。

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected OCR order and spelling from specificationsTorgue-speed; overlapping partial OCR ocr_002 and ocr_003 omitted.
Corrected merged OCR 11.53200 to coordinate callout.
Normalized unit formatting from Torque(Nm); overlapping fragment ocr_008 omitted.
Corrected merged OCR 3100.3.5 to coordinate callout.
Inserted spaces; overlapping partial OCR ocr_010 and ocr_012 omitted.
Inserted spaces; overlapping partial OCR ocr_015, ocr_016, ocr_017 and ocr_018 omitted.

drawing_metadata.unit_assumption: Chart units are rpm and N·m as visibly labeled; no mechanical length unit specified

terminology_notes: OCR partial overlaps and duplicated fragments were omitted when a higher-quality full text box existed.
Units are preserved from visible axis labels rather than inferred from mechanical drawing defaults.
translation_notes: Torque-speed specifications translated as 转矩-转速规格曲线.
Short-time duty zone translated as 短时工作区.
Continuous duty zone translated as 连续工作区.

dimension_records.reason: This is the chart title, not a mechanical dimension.
Vertical axis label defines torque units for the curve.
Horizontal axis label defines rotational speed units for the curve.
Coordinate callout marks the upper curve point on the torque-speed chart.

dimension_records.parameter_en: Rated or continuous torque operating point
dimension_records.reason: Coordinate callout marks the lower continuous-duty point on the chart.
Label identifies the upper operating region of the performance curve.
Label identifies the lower continuous operating region of the performance curve.
These are horizontal axis tick labels associated with the RPM axis.
The value is a visible vertical-axis torque tick associated with the Torque (N·m) axis.

frontend_table_records.parameter: Rated or continuous torque operating point

audit_table_records.parameter_en: Rated or continuous torque operating point

engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: The visible 3.5 torque tick and origin 0 markings do not have separate reliable OCR source_ids in the provided OCR list, so they were not added as independent text annotations.

unresolved_items.issue: Visible y-axis tick 3.5 lacks a reliable standalone OCR source_id; ocr_005 is a large noisy overlapping box and was not used.
Visible origin/zero tick labels lack reliable standalone OCR source_ids in the provided OCR list.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框为工程图底部的'未注线性公差'表，列出尺寸范围'0.5~3'、'>3~6'、'>6~30'、'>30~120'、'>120~400'及对应公差'±0.2'至'±1.2'，属于机械尺寸图纸中的线性尺寸公差信息。

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image
